description_long: This gate features a semi-circular wrought iron grill set within a robust stone base, flanked by two tall, rectangular stone pillars. The iron bars are vertically aligned and evenly spaced, providing both security and visibility through the gate. The stonework is composed of irregularly shaped, multi-toned blocks, giving the structure a rustic yet sturdy appearance. The pillars are capped with lighter stone slabs, adding a subtle decorative accent. The overall design suggests durability and a classic aesthetic, suitable for driveways, parks, or upscale residential entrances. There are no visible handles or locking mechanisms, indicating a simple, possibly manually operated gate.
description: A semi-circular wrought iron gate set in a stone base, flanked by two tall stone pillars with capstones. The design is sturdy and classic, with vertical iron bars and rustic stonework.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of a single stone pillar with visible stone texture and capstone.
description_view_1: Front angled view displaying the full semi-circular iron gate, stone base, and both supporting stone pillars.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the other stone pillar's profile.
description_view_3: Rear angled view similar to view 1, highlighting the back of the iron gate and stonework.
